n: Instance: A Song for the Company

steps.t: Leland Underhill is looking to recover something that was stolen from him by brigands. Leland Underhill has asked you to help him.
Leland Underhill is looking to recover something that was stolen from him by brigands. Leland Underhill has asked you to help him.
Leland Underhill is inside the cave hideout of the brigands that stole his lunch. Leland Underhill is waiting to speak with you.
